room.caption: [NH1] First Floor

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1136 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateH_2 image_xscale=16 newArrowPosX=112 newArrowPosY=48

noteType=9 noteToRead="Claire,
Mommy loves you, Claire. I had to do this. How will you become a proper lady if you don't learn.
You will tell your father that you fell on the way home."
if global.gateHProg<=18 {instance_destroy()} else if global.gateHProg>=20 {instance_destroy()}

noteType=12 noteToRead="I had Jerry over here despite my mother's wishes. He brings me comfort, but I have this nagging thought that it won't last. I should enjoy this while it's here.
My mother came home earlier than I thought. She can't catch me here with him. We hid in the utility closet till the coast was clear.
-Claire"
if global.gateHProg>=27 {instance_destroy()}
